releases.title: Fullscreen Play, Exit Buttons & Fresh Covers
notes: 🖥️ Games now launch in fullscreen automatically — every game fills your screen from the moment it opens, no window borders or title bars.
🚪 Every game now has an Exit Game button, styled to match its own menu, with a quick "you sure?" confirmation — your way back to the launcher now that games are fullscreen.
⏸️ Pausing is now standard — Escape and P both pause every real-time game, and games that never had a pause finally got one. Online matches are never frozen mid-game.
🐇 Hero's Quest no longer runs 2–3× too fast on 120Hz/144Hz monitors, and a sweep fixed smaller high-refresh-rate speedups across the other games.
🎨 Coldmere's redesigned cover art now ships with the launcher — new downloads were still getting the old cover.
🔧 Cover art now self-repairs on launch — when a game's cover gets a redesign in an update, it appears automatically, no cover-style swapping needed.
⚡ Smoother library scrolling on lower-powered PCs — the launcher now uses GPU acceleration more reliably and eases off card hover effects while you scroll, fixing stutter some players hit.

🏝️ Windward Isles: buildings now show subtle architectural detail where colors meet — a soft shadow groove settles into the seam between side-by-side walls, and stacked storeys of different colors get a grey stone trim belt along the join.

releases.title: Two New Games & a Coldmere Overhaul
notes: 🏔️ New game: Alien Alps — an alien snowboarding trick-run. Shred five moonlit mountains against a two-minute clock, chaining spins, flips, and rail grinds, beaming cows up to the mothership and dodging skiers all the way down.

🏝️ New game: Windward Isles — a serene island town-builder. Place pastel blocks to grow cozy houses, arches, and little harbors, rotate a day-night sky, snap photos, and autosave as many towns as you like — or open your town online and build it together with friends.

❄️ Coldmere — big update. You can finally escape the manor: floors now ramp from three candles to four to five while the entity grows bolder with every descent, with new Escape and Fastest-Floor stats and fresh achievements to chase.

🎨 Covers load reliably now — cover art refreshes correctly after updates instead of showing stale or blank cards, custom covers that went missing now self-heal, and a fix means newly added covers can always be selected.

releases.title: Two New Games & Reliable Updates
notes: 🖱️ New game: Cursored — a desktop dungeon roguelite where your mouse cursor is the blade. Slash through corrupted icons, grab new weapons from chests, and descend toward the Kernel.

🌀 New game: Switch Hunter — a first-person portal-puzzler across 11 chambers. Fling a teleport ball, warp to where it lands, and hit every switch to escape — while a clawed entity stalks you in the dark.
🔄 Automatic updates are now more reliable — the launcher shows live download progress, surfaces errors instead of hanging silently, and adds a manual "Check for Updates" button in What's New.

🎨 New "Preferred" cover option — switch every game back to its own chosen cover in one click. Default and Minimalist no longer overwrite covers you've customized per game, and your cover choices now stick between launches.
🏷️ Reworked multiplayer tags — games are now labeled Local, Online, Co-op, and PvP in their own section, replacing the old generic Multiplayer / Single Player tags.
🧭 New "Sort by Developer" view — browse the library grouped by creator, ordered by who's made the most games.

releases.title: Baseline & Multiplayer Fixes
notes: 🎾 Baseline: fixed the trophy ceremony where players' caps overlapped their faces.
🌐 Baseline online: the ball no longer disappears at your opponent's end — added opponent hit animations and smoother, predictive paddle movement for cleaner rallies.
🎾 Baseline: fixed never-ending rallies where the ball got stuck going straight back and forth in a corner — shots now angle out of the corner and long rallies speed up until someone misses.
🔍 Online: stale and abandoned rooms now clear out of the room browser, so you only see matches you can actually join.
🔴 Connect 4 online: you now see your opponent's live cursor hovering above the column they're considering.

🏷️ Online multiplayer: your real account name now shows up in-game and in the room browser across Connect 4, Chess, Checkers, Battleship, Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe, Poké Clash and Rhino Pileup — no more generic "Player 1" / "Player 2".
⚔️ Black Knight: fixed downloading for players who installed it before the new update system — your copy now refreshes to the latest version automatically.

releases.title: Baseline, Feedback & Polish
notes: 🆕 New game: Baseline — serve, rally, and outlast your opponent in this tennis arcade experience.
💬 Added a Feedback button so you can send notes and bug reports without leaving the launcher.
🔗 Added a Share button to show off your favorite games.
⚡ Big performance improvements to the launcher — faster load times and smoother navigation.
🙏 Added credits for third-party developers whose work powers several games.
🎨 Refreshed cover art for Rhino Pileup, Floe Fighters, and Coldmere.
🐛 Fixed a Void Assault softlock that could freeze your run if you had unlocked every upgrade.

releases.title: Black Knight Updates
notes: 💾 Black Knight: your run now saves automatically — close the game any time and pick up right where you left off with the new "Continue Run" button.
📖 Black Knight: the Bestiary now reveals each foe only after you've faced it, so there's something to uncover as you descend.
🎨 Black Knight: fresh cover art.
✅ Black Knight is out of work-in-progress and ready to play.
🌐 Fixed online multiplayer lobby search so open rooms show up reliably when browsing.
🐛 Squashed assorted bugs across several games for smoother, more stable play.

releases.title: Three New Games & Better Multiplayer
notes: 🎲 New game: Settlers — build, trade, and settle your way to victory with up to 6 players online.
🦆 New game: Cup of Duck — a four-level platformer where a determined mallard climbs, double-jumps, and glides toward a refreshing cup of berry water.
🧊 New game: Floe Fighters — fast-paced online multiplayer action on the ice.
🌐 Improved online multiplayer: smoother lobbies and solid support for games with 3 or more players.
✨ Various visual polish across the launcher.

releases.title: What's New & a Tidier Launcher
notes: ✨ Added a "What's New" button to the top bar so you can read release notes right in the launcher.
📜 What's New now opens to the latest update, with a "See all patch notes" button to browse the full history.
🔔 A gold dot appears on the button whenever a new update has notes you haven't seen yet.
🧹 Updates are now leaner — builds no longer include dev, test, or backup files, or personal save data.

releases.title: Pickle Arcade Launch
notes: 🎮 First public release of Pickle Arcade.
🕹️ Full game library with covers, stats, and achievements.
🏆 Player profiles, favorites, and a recently-played row.
🔄 Auto-updates: the launcher now checks for new versions on startup.
